about.description: Eagle Revolution was founded to do more than just build roofs, windows, decks, and siding. We are here to build a movement. Born in O’Fallon, Missouri, Eagle Revolution was launched by Brandon Anderson, a U.S. Army veteran and globally licensed combat sports official who brings battlefield discipline and boardroom precision to every project.

image.alt: Eagle Revolution team - Veteran owned roofing and exterior remodeling company

description: Eagle Revolution provides expert exterior remodeling services for homes and businesses. From windows and doors to roofing and decks, our team delivers quality craftsmanship with military precision.
Veteran Owned • Licensed • Bonded & Insured

section.headline: Veteran-Owned & Mission-Driven
section.description: Battlefield discipline meets boardroom precision. Eagle Revolution brings honor, integrity, and craftsmanship back to the remodeling industry.

ceo.name: Brandon Anderson
ceo.title: Founder • U.S. Army Veteran • Globally Licensed Combat Sports Official
quotes: Eagle Revolution was built to be more than just a remodeling company. It was built to lead a movement.
description: Based in O'Fallon, Missouri, Eagle Revolution was founded by Brandon Anderson, an Army veteran and globally licensed combat sports official who brings discipline, precision, and accountability to every project. With years of leadership experience at some of the largest home improvement companies in North America, Brandon saw firsthand how the industry had shifted away from homeowners and toward profits, leaving people with high prices, poor communication, and broken trust.

He knew it didn't have to be that way. Eagle Revolution was created to restore what the industry lost—trust, craftsmanship, and doing the job right the first time. Today, we stand as a local company built to compete with the biggest names in the country, not through gimmicks, but through transparency, quality work, and a relentless commitment to our customers.
Our systems are built for precision, but our strength is our people—driven professionals who take ownership, communicate clearly, and treat every home like their own.

section.headline: What Our Clients Say
section.description: Real stories from real clients about their experience with Eagle Revolution

testimonials.name: Jason K.
testimonials.text: Eagle Revolution is top-notch. The owner is one of the hardest-working, most professional people you'll meet. His attention to detail and pride in his work really stand out — you can tell he truly cares about doing things the right way. He's reliable, respectful, and easy to work with — the kind of person you can trust to get the job done right.

testimonials.name: Nathan Gearing
testimonials.text: I had the pleasure of working with Eagle Revolution for a recent construction project, and I couldn't be more impressed with their professionalism, quality of work, and attention to detail. From the initial consultation to project completion, the team was communicative, punctual, and dedicated to getting the job done right.

testimonials.name: Lucas Barth
testimonials.text: Eagle Revolution did a great job at my house with over 30 window replacements. There was clear, transparent and timely communication through the entire process and the installation went really well. I will recommend Brandon and Eagle Revolution to anyone looking for windows.

testimonials.name: Sarah Mitchell
testimonials.text: Brandon and his team replaced our roof after storm damage. They handled everything with the insurance company and made the process stress-free. The quality of work is outstanding and the new roof looks amazing!

testimonials.name: Mike Thompson
testimonials.text: We hired Eagle Revolution for a commercial TPO roof installation. Professional, on time, and within budget. Highly recommend their commercial roofing services.

section.headline: Frequently Asked Questions
section.description: Answers to common questions about our exterior remodeling services in St. Louis.

items.question: What services do you offer?
items.answer: We offer a range of services including residential roofing, commercial roofing, vinyl windows, entry doors, custom decks, siding, soffit, fascia, and gutters. We're your complete exterior remodeling solution in St. Louis.

items.question: Do you provide free estimates?
items.answer: Yes, we provide free inspections and estimates for all projects. Book your free quote today and get 15% off your project if you schedule by the end of the month!

items.question: Are you licensed and insured?
items.answer: Absolutely. We are fully licensed, bonded, and insured to ensure you receive professional and secure services. We're also IKO Certified Pro, CertainTeed Certified Shingle Master, and ProVia Certified Installers.

items.question: Do you offer financing or payment plans?
items.answer: Yes, we offer flexible financing options and convenient payment plans to make your project affordable and stress-free. We partner with some of the largest financing companies in the country to provide easy approval options.

items.question: How long does a roof replacement take?
items.answer: Most residential roof replacements are completed within 1-3 days, depending on the size of your home and weather conditions. Larger or commercial projects may take longer. We'll provide a detailed timeline during your free estimate.

items.question: What warranties do you offer on roofing?
items.answer: We install premium materials backed by 50-year transferable manufacturer warranties. Additionally, every project includes our Ten-Year Workmanship Guarantee, giving you peace of mind long after installation.

items.question: What types of windows do you install?
items.answer: We install premium vinyl windows including double-hung, casement, sliding, and bay windows. As ProVia Certified Installers, we ensure professional installation and energy-efficient products that reduce your utility bills.

items.question: What decking materials do you use?
items.answer: As  Wolf Home Products Certified installers, we specialize in premium composite decking that offers durability, low maintenance, and beautiful aesthetics. We also offer pressure-treated wood options for traditional decks.

items.question: What areas do you serve?
items.answer: We serve Missouri (St. Louis County, St. Louis City, St. Charles County, Jefferson County, Franklin County) and Illinois (Saint Clair County, Monroe County, Madison County).

items.question: Can you handle large-scale projects?
items.answer: Yes, we have the expertise and resources to handle both small and large-scale construction projects. We have a proven track record working with large federal roofing and construction projects.
